CHANGE RECORD 
 
When the quality of the products changes, the QuID is updated and a row is added to this table.  The 
third column specifies which sections or sub -sections have been updated.  The fourth column should 
mention the version of the product to which the change applies.

3.3 
 
 Page 5/ 76 
KEY DEFINITIONS 
GODAE metrics used in the document (Hernandez et al., 2009) 
Class1 Metrics that allow consistency assessment (i.e., comparison to climatologies) 
Class4 Metrics that aim to measure the performance of the forecasting system, its capability 
to describe the processes 
 
Levels of skill performance adopted in the document 
Level 1 Model capability to reproduce basin-wide spatial gradients, mean annual values in sub-
basins and average vertical profiles based on GODAE Class1 metrics 
Level 2 Model capability to reproduce the variability due to mesoscale and daily dynamics 
based on GODAE Class4 metrics (Hernandez et al., 2018) 
Level 3 Model capability to reproduce key biogeochemical processes based on specific metrics 
(Salon et al., 2019)
